# Oksa Satya — Backend Engineer / Full-Stack Developer

> Oksa Satya is a backend-focused Full-Stack Developer based in Indonesia. He builds
> reliable APIs, system integrations (payment, HRIS, logistics), and end-to-end SaaS
> platforms with Go, Java/Spring Boot, and Next.js. Since 2022 he has worked onsite in
> Dubai as a Full Stack Developer for PT Infini Software House Technology DMCC, and
> is currently building Dexova, an integrated ERP SaaS (HRIS, Payroll, POS, Inventory).

## About
- Name: Oksa Satya
- Role: Backend Engineer / Full-Stack Developer (backend-first)
- Based in: Dubai (onsite), originally from Indonesia
- Stack: Go (Echo, Gin), Java (Spring Boot), PHP (Laravel), Node.js; React/Next.js;
  PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis; Docker, Linux
- Specialties: REST APIs, hexagonal/clean architecture, multi-tenant systems, RBAC,
  payment & calendar integrations, gRPC, observability

## Flagship project
- Dexova — integrated ERP SaaS (HRIS, Payroll, POS, Inventory), modular Go backend,
  AI-powered, multi-tenant.

## Case studies
- Dexova ERP: https://oksasatya.dev/projects/dexova-erp
- Helixio (multi-tenant productivity SaaS): https://oksasatya.dev/projects/helixio
- Rahan Mancar (multi-tenant website/CMS platform): https://oksasatya.dev/projects/rahan-mancar
